infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Trinque uses your location only after you consent to find nearby restaurants. It stores only a coarse current location, not precise location history.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Trinque uses your location only after you consent to find nearby restaurants. It stores only a coarse current location, not precise location history.

plugins.photosPermission: Trinque uses your photos to identify dishes and suggest similar food nearby.
plugins.cameraPermission: Trinque uses your camera to identify dishes and suggest similar food nearby.
